eval_dimensions.name: Criteria Resolution
eval_dimensions.description: Loads plugin-default checks for the work type, applies repo overrides (remove/replace/add), and filters by active modes

eval_dimensions.name: Check Execution
eval_dimensions.description: Runs each automated check, resolves {pr_number}/{repo} placeholders, evaluates expect/expect_contains/expect_gt fields, and reports a pass/fail table

eval_dimensions.name: Merge-Gated Completion Gate (GH-729)
eval_dimensions.description: Never offers or auto-selects 'Work complete' while an associated PR is open/unmerged; recommends background review-monitoring instead; reserves completion for the merged (or PR-less) state

eval_dimensions.name: Scope-Deferred Review Threads (GH-736)
eval_dimensions.description: Honors review-deferred mode by skipping the unresolved-threads and review-request checks so the DoD reflects the agreed scope; never recommends 'Work complete' while a blocking check is failing

eval_dimensions.name: Live-State work_type Re-Inference (GH-780)
eval_dimensions.description: After loading the caller's work_type, re-infers from live state: an open PR upgrades a PR-less work_type (local-only/investigation) by unioning in the feature/pr-continuation checks (union, not replacement), so CI/draft/unresolved-threads checks are executed rather than silently skipped

evals.name: open-pr-recommends-monitor-not-complete
evals.prompt: /Dev10x:verify-acc-dod feature  (session: friction_level guided; all automated checks pass; PR #42 is OPEN and awaiting review)
evals.description: Tests that when every acceptance criterion passes but the associated PR is open/unmerged, the gate recommends 'Monitor for review' (routing to Dev10x:gh-pr-monitor) and NOT 'Work complete'.
evals.expected_output: AskUserQuestion fires with 'Monitor for review (Recommended)' as the first option, routing to Dev10x:gh-pr-monitor. 'Work complete' is NOT offered as the recommended option while PR #42 is unmerged.

assertions.text: Resolves PR merge state via pr_detect / verify_pr_state before deciding the gate
Recommended option is 'Monitor for review' routing to Dev10x:gh-pr-monitor
'Work complete' is NOT the recommended/auto-selected option while the PR is open/unmerged

evals.name: adaptive-open-pr-auto-starts-monitor
evals.prompt: /Dev10x:verify-acc-dod feature  (session: friction_level adaptive, active_modes [solo-maintainer]; all checks pass; PR #42 OPEN, unmerged)
evals.description: Tests that at adaptive level with an open/unmerged PR, the skill auto-starts the background monitor instead of auto-completing, and the residual terminal task becomes 'Monitor PR #N for review / merge'.
evals.expected_output: No 'Work complete' auto-completion. Skill(Dev10x:gh-pr-monitor) is dispatched in the background; the residual task is 'Monitor PR #42 for review / merge'. No AskUserQuestion interruption.

assertions.text: Does NOT auto-complete 'Work complete' while the PR is open/unmerged

evals.name: merged-pr-allows-work-complete
evals.prompt: /Dev10x:verify-acc-dod feature  (session: friction_level guided; all checks pass; PR #42 is MERGED)
evals.description: Tests that once the PR is merged (or the work is PR-less), the gate offers/auto-selects 'Work complete' as before.
evals.expected_output: AskUserQuestion offers 'Work complete (Recommended)' because PR #42 is merged.

assertions.text: 'Work complete' is the recommended option once the PR is merged

evals.name: review-deferred-skips-thread-check
evals.prompt: /Dev10x:verify-acc-dod bugfix  (session: friction_level adaptive, active_modes [solo-maintainer, review-deferred]; CI green, working copy clean, PR #42 OPEN; two review threads remain unresolved)
evals.description: Tests that with review-deferred active, the unresolved-threads and review-request checks are removed from scope (reported as skipped), so the gate resolves honestly to Monitor for review instead of staying red — and is NOT papered over as 'Work complete'.
evals.expected_output: The 'No unresolved review threads' and 'Re-review requested' checks are reported as 'skipped (mode: review-deferred)'. Remaining checks pass, PR #42 is open → recommendation is 'Monitor for review' (background gh-pr-monitor). 'Work complete' is NOT recommended.

assertions.text: Removes the 'No unresolved review threads' check from scope and reports it as skipped (mode: review-deferred)
Does NOT recommend/auto-select 'Work complete' on the strength of skipping the deferred check while the PR is still open

evals.name: local-only-with-open-pr-runs-feature-checks
evals.prompt: /Dev10x:verify-acc-dod local-only  (session: friction_level adaptive; work-on classified the free-text input as local-only at plan time, but the Decide step chose 'create PR' and PR #42 is now OPEN)
evals.description: Tests that a local-only invocation with an open PR present re-infers the PR-shaped work type and executes the CI + PR-not-draft + unresolved-threads checks, rather than running only the thin 2-check local-only checklist (GH-780).
evals.expected_output: pr_detect resolves PR #42. The feature (or pr-continuation) checks are unioned into the local-only checklist: 'CI passing', 'PR not draft', and 'No unresolved review threads' are executed and shown in the results table, annotated as re-inferred. The caller's local-only checks (Working copy clean, Changes verified) are retained, not replaced.

assertions.text: Resolves the open PR via pr_detect before finalizing the check set
Executes the re-inferred CI / PR-not-draft / unresolved-threads checks, not just the thin local-only checklist
Keeps the caller's local-only checks (union, not replacement)
